title: XV7 turbolaser
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''XV7 turbolaser''' was a shipboard emplacement weapon produced by [[Taim & Bak/Legends|Taim & Bak]]. This light-duty [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] was commonly employed onboard [[IPV-1 System Patrol Craft|IPV-1 Patrol Craft]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
*{{StoryCite|story=The Stele Chronicles|book=Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)}} {{1st|[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]}}
